title: cortex.approval.*
description: Re-emitted by cortex-consumer after verifying an OpenClaw inbound approval. Subject: cortex.approval.<stage>

nonce.description: Single-use random value; stored in cortex_approvals_seen KV for replay prevention.

expires_at.description: ISO8601 expiry; consumer rejects if now > expires_at.

stage.description: Factory stage this approval applies to.

actor.description: User who performed the approval action.

hmac.description: HMAC-SHA256 over JCS canonical payload (excluding this field) with CORTEX_NATS_HMAC.
